Details: Pre-oxidation with chlorine is effective for molinate removal.  One study found complete (100 percent) removal with the addition of 18 mg/L chlorine [723]. The chlorine demand of the Ebro River water tested in this study was used to determine the chlorine dose.  No other chlorine doses were considered. Pre-oxidation with chlorine should be balanced with the formation of other contaminants of concern such as disinfection byproducts.
